d1115c1af5c88d6d.resultTeX: \frac{1}{2 \varepsilon^2}+\frac{\frac{3}{2}-\log (m^2)}{\varepsilon}+\left(\frac{2 H\left(0,\frac{1}{W_1^-+1}\,;1\right)}{W_1^-+1}+\frac{2 H\left(0,\frac{1}{W_1^++1}\,;1\right)}{W_1^++1}+\frac{\zeta(2) W_1^+}{\left(W_1^-+1\right) \left(W_1^++1\right)}+\frac{2 \zeta(2)}{\left(W_1^-+1\right) \left(W_1^++1\right)}+\frac{\zeta(2) W_1^-}{\left(W_1^-+1\right) \left(W_1^++1\right)}-\frac{2 \zeta(2)}{2 W_1^-+2}-\frac{\log ^2\left(-W_1^-\right)}{2 W_1^-+2}-\frac{2 \zeta(2)}{2 W_1^++2}-\frac{\log ^2\left(-W_1^+\right)}{2 W_1^++2}+\log ^2(m^2)-3 \log (m^2)+\frac{\zeta(2)}{2}+\frac{7}{2}\right)+O\left(\varepsilon^1\right)
d1115c1af5c88d6d.normalizedSymbolTeX: \begin{aligned}\varepsilon^{-2}&\colon\;\frac{1}{2} \\ \varepsilon^{-1}&\colon\;\frac{3}{2}-\log \left(m^2\right) \\ \varepsilon^{0}&\colon\;\frac{1}{\left(W_1^-+1\right) \left(W_1^++1\right)}\!\left[2 \left(W_1^++1\right)\,(W_1 \otimes W^-_1) - W_1^+-1\,(W^-_1 \otimes W^-_1) + 2 \left(W_1^-+1\right)\,(W_2 \otimes W^+_1) - W_1^--1\,(W^+_1 \otimes W^+_1)\right]\end{aligned}
